Verified Reviews

What Your Neighbors Have to Say

Read More Reviews →
M
Maria G.

Electrical Experts Of San Diego did an amazing job upgrading our electrical panel. Our old panel was outdated and couldn't handle our new appliances. The team was professional, efficient, and explained everything clearly. We highly recommend them!

D
David S.

We hired Electrical Experts Of San Diego to install recessed lighting in our living room. They did a great job, and the new lighting looks fantastic. There was a small delay due to a part shortage, but they communicated well and kept us informed throughout the process.

J
Jessica L.

I had a few outlets that weren't working, and Electrical Experts Of San Diego fixed them quickly and efficiently. The electrician was friendly and knowledgeable, and the price was very reasonable. I will definitely use them again in the future.

R
Robert K.

The team at Electrical Experts Of San Diego installed my EV charger perfectly. They were very helpful in choosing the right charger for my car and made the whole process easy. I'm very happy with their service!

Electrical Experts Of San Diego — Certified Professionals

Our team brings certified expertise and years of experience to every electrician project. We stand behind our work with comprehensive warranties and a commitment to quality.

More About Us →

The Electrical Experts Of San Diego Way

Our proven process ensures every project is completed with precision, transparency, and care.

1

Consultation

We start with a thorough, no-obligation assessment. Our certified team evaluates your needs and provides a detailed report with recommendations.

2

Plan & Prepare

We work with you to determine the best approach for your specific electrician needs. Our experts ensure the right plan for quality results.

3

Get It Done

Our skilled team gets to work with precision and efficiency. We maintain a clean, organized environment and keep you informed every step of the way.

4

Quality Check

Before we consider any job complete, our team performs a comprehensive quality review. We verify every detail meets our exacting standards.

5

Wrap Up

Transparent pricing with no surprises. You only pay when you're 100% satisfied with the work. We offer flexible options to make the process seamless.

Proudly Serving San Diego & Beyond

As a locally owned and operated company, we're proud to serve customers throughout San Diego, CA and the surrounding communities. Our team brings local expertise and dedication to every project.

Let's Get Started →

Frequently Asked Questions

Get answers to the most common questions about our electrician services.

How do I know if I need an electrical panel upgrade?

Common signs include flickering lights, tripped breakers, outdated panel, and the inability to add new electrical loads. If you're experiencing any of these issues, it's time to call Electrical Experts Of San Diego.

How long does an electrical panel upgrade take?

Typically, an electrical panel upgrade can be completed in one day. However, it depends on the complexity of the installation and any unforeseen issues that may arise.

Do I need a permit for an electrical panel upgrade?

Yes, a permit is required for electrical panel upgrades in San Diego. We handle all the permitting process for you, ensuring compliance with local regulations.

Built on San Diego Values

Contact Electrical Experts Of San Diego for reliable service and expert solutions.

Let's Begin →
